These are reasonable given the code's nature.\n\n- **Malware & Obfuscated Scores:**  \n  No signs of malware or obfuscation are present. The code is transparent, standard, and auto-generated.\n\n- **Potential Vulnerabilities or Assumptions:**  \n  Since this code only creates interfaces and connects to a contract at a specified address, any security concern would stem from how the address or signer/provider is used elsewhere, not from this factory code itself.\n\n---\n\n### Critical Evaluation:\n\n- **Is there any malicious behavior?**  \n  No. The code is a typical interface factory for a well-known DeFi contract.\n\n- **Are there any signs of obfuscation?**  \n  No. The code is straightforward, auto-generated, with clear structure.\n\n- **Is the reported risk score unreasonable?**  \n  No. The risk scores are appropriately low, given the benign nature of the code.\n\n- **Are the scores consistent with the code?**  \n  Yes.
